message:
style(tests): minor cleanups — raw-string pick, doc-comment wrap

Three pure-cleanup changes surfaced by clippy / fmt after the
earlier rustfmt sweep.

tests/e2e_sync_artifacts.rs
---------------------------
Break a run-on doc comment in
`e2e_rebuilt_alt_db_preserves_fresh_lookup_and_mutation_paths` into
a numbered list plus a trailing sentence. Renders better in
rustdoc and keeps the "also asserts the alternate DB stays readable
by upstream sqlite3" invariant front and centre.

tests/test_create_deps_colon.rs, tests/test_create_parent_standin.rs
--------------------------------------------------------------------
Switch two `r#"..."#` raw strings to `r"..."`. Neither content
contains a `"` character, so the extra `#` pair was redundant;
clippy's `needless_raw_string_hashes` flags this. Functionally
identical.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@ fn test_create_parent_standin() {
     let file_path = temp.path().join("issues.md");
     std::fs::write(
         &file_path,
-        r#"
+        r"
 ## My Epic
 ### ID
 epic1
@@ -26,7 +26,7 @@ epic
 ## My Task
 ### Parent
 epic1
-"#,
+",
     )
     .unwrap();
